generated_oml:
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on motor for measuring motor shaft angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder mounted behind gearbox for measuring output angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current to permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured current input to permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from gearbox position encoder time series data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque calculated from current sensor data and motor parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque output from friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted, GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Dashboard
]

instance SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural description of robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SysMLInternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural description of robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for joint friction simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for joint friction simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for joint friction simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for joint friction simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for friction simulation and model refinement"
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor time series data"
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShells : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for data integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance Dashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization dashboard for understanding physical relationships"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance JointFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelIdentificationInsight, JointFrictionDynamicsInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization via dashboard for understanding physical relationships"
    DTDFVocab:provides UnderstandingPhysicalRelationshipsInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy improvement through model refinement"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyImprovementAction, ControlAlgorithmUpdateAction
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model identification for improving robot motion accuracy"
]

instance JointFrictionDynamicsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into joint friction dynamics to inform control algorithm updates"
]

instance UnderstandingPhysicalRelationshipsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into physical relationships through visualization"
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Improving robot motion accuracy through model refinement"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlAlgorithmUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Updating control algorithms based on friction dynamics insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot for machining applications purpose-driven twinning process with problem identification, asset analysis, model creation, data identification documented in paper sections II-VI"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGearbox, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslController, MotorPositionEncoder, GearboxPositionEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with current input I_M and torque output τ_M"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission component with torque τ_G"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component with torque τ_out"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller providing position, speed, or acceleration inputs"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction; digital shadow functions as a passive entity with one-way data flow from physical to virtual only, as per Kritzinger et al. [32]."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing and synchronization; live measurements streamed via MQTT for immediate friction model identification."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of SysML structural models, Simulink simulation models, MQTT-sourced sensor data, and dashboard visualization within a digital shadow framework for real-time friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated); continuous monitoring and model refinement during robot operation to account for wear, tool changes, and varying applications."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated data versus measured data to validate friction models; continuous identification to address changes due to wear, tools, or applications."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data (current, angle) from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) for data integration; SysML as standard modeling language for system description."
]
